name: What comp benefits cover for chronic cough from workplace chemicals?
description: Medicals, lost wages at 66%, disability ratings.

mainEntity.name: What comp benefits cover for chronic cough from workplace chemicals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medicals, lost wages at 66%, disability ratings.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical care, wage replacement (2/3 wages), permanent disability lump sums.** Covers treatment, rehab for obliterans-like diseases[2][4]. Key factors: Impairment percentage sets payout; vocational retraining; death benefits for survivors. Utah max weekly ~$1K. File for TTD first. Track all expenses for reimbursement.
